title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Max Fashion Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Max Fashion Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Max Fashion Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Fashion Holdings Services:
Max Fashion Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion Holdings Services!
